strengths: Nearly 20 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and still runs GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production by NGOs
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) plus a history of public talks and workshops
concerns: No demonstrated director/principal-level scope — career has been senior/staff IC roles without evidence of strategic or organizational leadership
AI experience is recent and tooling-oriented; no recognized AI expertise, ML depth, or shipped AI products at platform scale
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, and cloud experience is applied rather than platform-strategy or customer-advisory level

key_factors.factor: Tenure, entrepreneurial and emerging AI-tooling background

response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, seasoned engineer with genuine builder credentials, startup/founder experience, and early exposure to AI-agent tooling, which touches several preferred qualifications. However, this role is a director-level IC focused on AI strategy, customer advisory, and recognized AI thought leadership — areas where the resume shows little evidence. The fit is stronger for a senior/staff product engineering role than a principal AI-strategy position.
